H

handle(KeyEvent) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.PlacementKeyAdapter
 
handle(MouseEvent) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController.ShotClickAdapter
 
handle(MouseEvent) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.CellClickAdapter
 
handle(MouseEvent) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.CellHoverAdapter
 
handle(MouseEvent) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.TraySelectAdapter
 
handleExit() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Saves progress (if a match is in progress) and returns to the main menu.
handleHumanShot(Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Validates and applies a human shot at coordinate, under the same synchronized (gameSession) monitor that MachineTurnThread uses, so a click that sneaks in while the machine thread is about to wake up can never race it.
handleRestart() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
During placement, restart just resets ship placement as before.
hashCode() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate
 
hasSave() - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence.GamePersistenceManager

HEADER_SIZE - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
 
hideInstructionsOverlay() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
highlightedTrayEntry - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
highlightTrayEntry(Node) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
HIT - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.CellState
A shot hit a ship part, but the ship it belongs to is not fully sunk.
HIT_DOT_RADIUS - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardTheme
 
HIT_MARKER_RADIUS - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardTheme
 
hitCells - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Ship
 
HORIZONTAL - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation
 
HUMAN - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Shot.Shooter
The human player fired this shot.
humanPlayer - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
humanPlayer - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession
 
HumanPlayer - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Represents the human player.
HumanPlayer(String) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.HumanPlayer
Creates the human player with the given nickname.
HumanPlayer(String, Board) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.HumanPlayer
Creates the human player wrapped around a board that was already built and populated during the placement phase (see Player(String, Board)).
humanTurn - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession
 
huntQueue - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy.RandomHuntStrategy
Candidate cells to try while in hunt mode.
